footer.techStack: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS & ECharts. Data parsed from public articles.

hero.description_line1: From 2021 to 2026, a panoramic view of China's most ambitious tech innovators.
hero.description_line2: Discover trends and find the next unicorn.

search_hero.placeholder_desktop: Search entire library: try 'Embodied AI', 'LLM' or 'Tsinghua'...

insights_section.title: Overview
insights_section.subtitle: Witness the evolution of tech entrepreneurship in China from 2021 to 2026

sector_chart.title: Sector Trends
sector_chart.desc: Yearly structure based on each project's primary sector

uni_chart.title: Top Universities
uni_chart.desc: Top schools forming the core entrepreneurial force

batches_section.title: Startup Batches
batches_section.subtitle: Every batch is a collision of technology and ideals. Click to view detailed project lists.

explore.search_placeholder: Search projects, tags, founders or schools...

explore.empty_desc: Try adjusting filters or search keywords

insights.title: Data Insights
insights.subtitle: Multidimensional data analysis based on {count} selected projects, revealing trends in tracks and talent flow.

trends.title: Sector Trends
trends.desc: The rise and fall of various technology sectors over the past five years

source.title: Innovation Source
source.desc: Founder persona distribution, educational background, and career history

detail.tooltip: Official count is {official}. This site collected {actual} based on public roadshow data.

2026S.name: 2026 Spring Batch
2026S.desc: Researcher founders account for 45%, with 56 projects spanning agents, embodied & physical intelligence, data, infrastructure, and FDE consulting.

2025F.name: 2025 Fall Batch
2025F.desc: Innovation thresholds drop rapidly, value creation logic is reshaped, and innovation boundaries continue to expand.

2025S.name: 2025 Spring Batch
2025S.desc: The root of driving innovation is to support young founders with both research and hands-on capabilities at the source.

2024F.name: 2024 Fall Batch
2024F.desc: Frontier innovation signals explode: LLMs, Multimodal, Data, and Embodied AI lead a new wave of entrepreneurship.

2024S.name: 2024 Spring Batch
2024S.desc: Applicants are younger, frontier signals stronger. Embodied AI, Robotics, and Research-driven become mainstream.

2023S.name: 2023 Spring Batch
2023S.desc: Year of the LLM. Strong frontier signals, with AI and LLM-themed companies dominating.

2022F.name: 2022 Fall Batch
2022F.desc: Strong signals of LLM driving industry development. Metaverse and Life Sciences sectors are active.

2022S.name: 2022 Spring Batch
2022S.desc: First purely online Demo Day. Metaverse and Web3 become the biggest highlights.

2021F.name: 2021 Fall Batch
2021F.desc: Received over 4000 applications. Metaverse signals appear, high proportion of Hard Tech projects.

2021S.name: 2021 Spring Batch
2021S.desc: Tech-driven established as the core paradigm of early-stage startups. Innovation permeates deep into compute infra, life sciences, and advanced manufacturing.

founder_metrics.young_tooltip: Includes founders explicitly mentioned as 'Gen Z', 'Student', 'Dropout' in bio, or current undergrad/master students estimated by enrollment year.
